payload:
BitNet-SOLE Research Loop — ternary base + ternary adapters, all local.

ARCHITECTURE: BitNet-SOLE — BitNet-2B-4T ternary base + ternary LoRA adapters (QAT with STE) + 1/N composition.
STATE: Read .ralph/current_direction.md for active phase. Read HYPOTHESES.yml (bitnet section) for full roadmap.
CONTEXT: VISION.md, FINDINGS.md, references/BITNET_SOLE_RESEARCH.md, plans/concurrent-swimming-tarjan.md.

SCALE CONSTRAINT: micro only. Everything runs LOCALLY on Apple Silicon via MLX. No RunPod. ... [truncated, 3371 chars total]

exp_bitnet_monolithic_rank_matched: SUPPORTED. SOLE wins 4/5 domains at matched 108M params (avg -3.7% PPL advantage). Only creative favors monolithic (+6.3%). Rank scaling r16->r80 yields only -2.2%. Specialization genuinely beats parameter scaling.

exp_bitnet_monolithic_rank_matched: SUPPORTED. SOLE wins 3-4/5 domains at exactly matched 108M params (avg -3.7% PPL advantage). Rank scaling r16->r80 yields only -2.2%. Code gap (2.1%) within seed noise; legal (-5.8%) and medical (-3.0%) robust. Creative exception confounded by SOLE creative training failure. LoRA scaling factor confound noted (20.0 for both ranks). Specialization genuinely beats parameter scaling.

experiment: exp_bitnet_monolithic_rank_matched. Core learning: specialization beats parameter scaling — SOLE wins 3-4/5 domains at exact param parity, explained by rank scaling diminishing returns (rsLoRA), orthogonality-enabled composition (Cao 2025), and optimizer state specialization. 5 confirming, 3 contradicting papers. rsLoRA scaling confound is #1 weakness (P2 fix). No hypothesis modification needed.

exp_bitnet_instruction_tuned_task_eval: SUPPORTED. Instruction-tuned LoRA adapters pass task eval (K1: 0-20% metrics worse vs 40% threshold, K2: math +6.7pp vs 3pp threshold). Key: instruction format is the fix, not architecture. Code syntax 5%→100%, legal F1 11→26.5%, medical F1 17.9→25.4%. Orthogonality preserved |cos|=0.00084. Caveats: small eval sets, prompt format confound, legal memorization, single seed.

exp_bitnet_instruction_task_eval: REVISE. 4 fixes: (1) Flag legal eval as degenerate—all 15 samples produce identical output, exclude from K1 count. (2) Add caveat to NTP comparison table—prompt formats differ across columns. (3) Report K2 95% CI [0.2%,32%], note 1/15 is statistically inconclusive. (4) Weaken reverses-NTP-KILL framing—effect sizes are small (medical +0.1pp, math 1 problem, code 1 problem). Core directional finding (instruction > NTP) holds. Orthogonality clean.

exp_bitnet_instruction_task_eval: REVISE fixes applied. (1) Legal flagged degenerate, excluded from K1. (2) NTP comparison table caveated for prompt confound. (3) K2 CI [0.2%,32%] reported as inconclusive. (4) Weakened reverses-NTP-KILL framing. Core finding holds: instruction > NTP directionally. Ready for re-review.

exp_bitnet_instruction_task_eval: PROCEED. Instruction-tuned adapters SUPPORTED on BitNet-2B task eval. K1 PASS (1/4 excl degenerate legal), K2 directionally positive but statistically inconclusive (1/15, CI 0.2-32%). Orthogonality clean (|cos|=0.00084). Small effect sizes, underpowered eval. NTP comparison confounded by prompt format. HYPOTHESES.yml and FINDINGS.md updated with caveated framing.

experiment: exp_bitnet_instruction_task_eval, core_learning: instruction tuning is necessary but effect sizes are small on 2B - routing beats merging and eval must scale to 100+ samples, confirming_papers: 4 (Biderman 2405.09673 + Li 2310.00492 + LoRA Soups 2410.13025 + TinyGSM 2312.09241), contradicting_papers: 2 (adapter merging traces 2603.15965 + TinyGSM verifier requirement), hypothesis_update: none needed - instruction format already default per prior direction

exp_bitnet_clone_compete_powered: KILLED (K1+K3). Clone wins only 28.9% per-sample at N=500 (p<0.0001). Cold-start control matches clone aggregate PPL (13.23 vs 13.24, d=-0.004, p=0.934). Warm-start inheritance is illusory - 100% improvement from additional data, 0% from cloning. Evolve phase simplifies to retrain-from-scratch.

exp_bitnet_clone_compete_powered: KILLED (K1+K3), review PROCEED. Clone wins 28.9% per-sample (p<0.0001), cold-start matches clone aggregate PPL (d=-0.004, p=0.934). Warm-start inheritance illusory. Consecutive kills: 2. Code verdict bug (INCONCLUSIVE vs KILLED). Retrain-from-scratch replaces clone-compete for Evolve phase.

exp_bitnet_clone_compete_powered: Warm-start inheritance illusory (confirmed by Recycling LoRAs 2602.12323 + Less is More 2506.14126). Clone memorizes hard examples that don't survive merging. Evolve redesign: retrain-from-scratch replaces clone-compete. 4 confirming, 3 partially contradicting papers. 3 new refs added. No hypothesis modification needed — kill already reflected in FINDINGS.md.

exp_bitnet_basefree_exploration: K1 KILLED (skeleton PPL 319M vs base 11.55, 27.6M-fold ratio >> 5x threshold). K2 PASS (23/30 layers individually replaceable <20% regression). Base-free composition dead at production scale — pretrained base IS the model, not a scaffold. U-shaped layer criticality: layers 0-4,28-29 critical, 10-16 replaceable. Progressive ablation super-exponential. Toy-scale (d=64) extrapolation catastrophically wrong (6.9x vs 27.6Mx at d=2560).
